###### Categories

[All categories](https://www.framer.com/gallery/categories/)

[Agency\\
\\
Dive into a world of creativity as leading design agencies push the boundaries of web design with Framer. Immerse yourself in their captivating digital experiences, crafted to inspire and captivate.\\
\\

[Blog\\
\\
Each site featured here stands out for its unique approach to layout and typography, creating immersive reading environments. Ideal for content creators looking for design inspiration and businesses aiming to elevate their blogs.\\
\\

\\
Meet our customers. Framer helps companies design and launch sites of any size. Make sure to also check out the in-depth case studies available for some.\\
\\

[Ecommerce\\
\\
These e-commerce sites do more than just sell. They use design to showcase products, build trust, and create a smooth, branded shopping experience.\\
\\
![](https://framerusercontent.com/images/RxghrMImNUbaoevZOI8O3n5z0.jpg?width=2080&height=3708)\\

\\
![](https://framerusercontent.com/images/eRxpTflLWrQNtKXJFAvXn82M.png?width=1984&height=3524)](https://www.framer.com/gallery/categories/ecommerce)

[Landing Page\\
\\
Each featured site demonstrates excellence in landing page design, showcasing clarity, compelling calls-to-action, and creative visuals. Ideal for marketers, designers, and businesses focused on maximizing online conversions. Discover the power of a well-crafted landing page in guiding visitors toward a desired action, whether subscribing, purchasing, or learning more.\\
\\
![](https://framerusercontent.com/images/zrxv1aSgfb2krkw9TJlMTINGHLA.jpg?width=2266&height=4264)\\
\\
![](https://framerusercontent.com/images/M2NfXTp2DsrqTEa7MQ5GjtvdxSc.png?width=1200&height=2132)\\
\\
![](https://framerusercontent.com/images/iXzMaI4J6LS7RFJUPL0137YL4xM.jpg?width=1200&height=2132)\\
\\
![](https://framerusercontent.com/images/8of9cHOs7UaOQaT538paXfGAQOA.jpg?width=1200&height=2132)](https://www.framer.com/gallery/categories/landing-page)

[Personal\\
\\
Explore Framer-crafted personal websites, ranging from portfolios to blogs and artist showcases, for inspiration on designing a website that represents you.\\
\\

###### Styles

[All styles](https://www.framer.com/gallery/styles)

[Animations\\
\\
Our gallery features innovative and visually stunning designs showcasing the transformative power of animations in web design. Explore the pinnacle of animated web creativity crafted in Framer for inspiration and insight.\\
\\

[Colorful\\
\\
Here you can find websites that use color creatively to create memorable online experiences. Browse hand-picked designs that are visually striking and enhance usability. Perfect for designers seeking inspiration and businesses looking to stand out.\\
\\
![](https://framerusercontent.com/images/aSwpXdDQFlBjWOb2qHhTrVemNC8.webp?width=2538&height=4487)\\

\\
![](https://framerusercontent.com/images/5yeHQNNWj7S9piYAX78gzhzoiw.jpg?width=2072&height=3708)](https://www.framer.com/gallery/styles/colorful)

[Dark\\
\\
Discover sleek and modern websites that use dark color schemes in our Dark category. Our curated selection showcases the finest examples in this style, crafted with Framer’s versatile design tools. Ideal for designers seeking inspiration in dark-themed web design and businesses aiming for a bold online presence.\\
\\
![](https://framerusercontent.com/images/xRkXGf9FO8ts8qwnSI7OLuKabbc.jpg?width=2080&height=3708)\\
\\
![](https://framerusercontent.com/images/7r9UosWnfh7DTx9ukCgF0oXDsY.jpg?width=2080&height=3708)\\
\\
![](https://framerusercontent.com/images/mpvPCHpWCKJvB80Ey581wkhPPL8.jpg?width=2080&height=3708)\\
\\
![](https://framerusercontent.com/images/V5W7v1g12eMEtcLmPhMha6hrkg4.jpg?width=2080&height=3708)](https://www.framer.com/gallery/styles/dark)

[Grid\\
\\
A showcase of the best in grid-based web design. It’s perfect for designers and businesses seeking a clean, structured online presence. Experience how Framer-designed sites turn a simple grid into an extraordinary visual and functional element.\\
\\
![](https://framerusercontent.com/images/84qIrUhXUHS2VIKoScQKmyIpY.jpg?width=2080&height=3708)\\
\\
![](https://framerusercontent.com/images/RxghrMImNUbaoevZOI8O3n5z0.jpg?width=2080&height=3708)\\
\\
![](https://framerusercontent.com/images/ZA12Vw4sEIcPk5u37riBW6S8Bs.jpg?width=2080&height=3708)\\
\\
![](https://framerusercontent.com/images/YMyolrfl2NzVd82Vm8JsB8n7qR4.jpg?width=2080&height=3708)](https://www.framer.com/gallery/styles/grid)

[Large Type\\
\\
This showcase features websites that use oversized text to make a statement and create a unique visual identity. Ideal for designers and businesses seeking to make a strong impression online. Explore Framer-crafted sites that demonstrate how typography can enhance a website’s aesthetic and user experience.\\
\\
![](https://framerusercontent.com/images/IZEa38X21f8bod61ghilIMqutmY.jpg?width=2080&height=3708)\\
\\
![](https://framerusercontent.com/images/zrxv1aSgfb2krkw9TJlMTINGHLA.jpg?width=2266&height=4264)\\
\\
![](https://framerusercontent.com/images/UW3qUbZ5cU0LoUHhBGfsqPNI5rI.jpg?width=1200&height=2132)\\
\\
![](https://framerusercontent.com/images/SFQxMaM9ovVeP3DMtnKSfiSiYhs.jpg?width=2616&height=4724)](https://www.framer.com/gallery/styles/large-type)

[Minimal\\
\\
This style showcases websites that prioritize essential features, clean lines, and a limited color palette for a maximum impact. Ideal for designers seeking inspiration and businesses aiming for a sleek, modern online presence.\\
\\
![](https://framerusercontent.com/images/EuLdkeqqEEwHst92jIdXoL5QtJw.jpg?width=2080&height=3708)\\
\\
![](https://framerusercontent.com/images/9ElugtYfDPUL2zIdD3oZGpkmOFo.jpg?width=2080&height=3708)\\
\\
![](https://framerusercontent.com/images/8hRwBmSYPVmhet8COe21qOaIr9w.jpg?width=2080&height=3708)\\
\\
![](https://framerusercontent.com/images/Qztgz1DPuFMxOMRpQGDAzV7pU8I.jpg?width=2080&height=3708)](https://www.framer.com/gallery/styles/minimal)
